name: Sesame Place Philadelphia
city: Middletown Township, Bucks County, Pennsylvania, United States
description: Sesame Place Philadelphia is a children's theme park and water park based on the children's educational television program Sesame Street.  It is one of the two Sesame Place theme parks owned and operated by United Parks & Resorts under an exclusive license from Sesame Workshop, the non-profit owner of Sesame Street.  Located outside of Philadelphia in Middletown Township, Bucks County, Pennsylvania (with a Langhorne mailing address), it is the older of the two Sesame Street theme parks in the United States (the other being Sesame Place San Diego).
